item.title: 12 March 2026 - some assets + RSS display broken
item.description: added some things to the about which I am very proud of + noticed that the RSS feed display in my sidebar is broken for some reason, which iiiiii will fix at some point when I get the chance.

item.title: 11 March 2026 - blog, burnout, etc...
item.description: currently experiencing a frankly awful amount of burnout re: styling this site, actually optimizing things, etc., but DID add semblances of a blog page, some more buttons, & other things...

item.title: 28 Dec 2025 - sitemap, rooms, new pages
item.description: made some new pages! trying to organize what i want to exist in my room page, although not greatly successfully without the visuals. struggled a bit with git. uhhh. added a blog page and that's fully formatted although i haven't written anything there yet! all in all a fairly productive day

item.title: 26 Dec 2025
item.description: created Kingdom Hearts fanpage; added more to fruiperheroes page; linked the website to git (which i am using right now to update this!), AND. added an rss feed so now all devlogs and other updates will be here! yippee!

item.title: 25 Dec 2025
item.description: changed the main font everyone say thank you Kelvinch

item.title: 20 Dec 2025
item.description: I FORGOR THIS WAS HERE. uhhhh. updated some ui things and added more to the fruiperheroes page!

item.title: 9 Dec 2025
item.description: procrastinating like hell. added a music player though!

item.title: 8 Dec 2025
item.description: added favorites box to the about page!

item.title: 6 Dec 2025
item.description: dude i added like ten pages and functions. mostly overhauled the about page?? and i think added site recs to the navbar

item.title: 4 Dec 2025
item.description: guestbook is up and running! also dear god i need to stop procrastinating someone get me out of here

item.title: 3 Dec 2025
item.description: made a couple new pages, moved about to homepage, fixed some features. also tweaked mobile compatibility several days ago but i forgor to write about it

item.title: 24 Nov 2025
item.description: hauled ass on the gallery. alt text + captions + open/close are all working now

item.title: 20 Nov 2025
item.description: streamlined the footer + other things, basically done with the main layout of the website and its pages!! basically just need to improve accessibility + finish some other pages + alsooo add some other small features

item.title: 15 Nov 2025
item.description: made and filled rec page, fixed up some other ones to varying success, styled hr line. figured out the css with multiple styles thing!

item.title: 13 Nov 2025
item.description: made a new header!! also added some content on various pages

item.title: 12 Nov 2025
item.description: added button hotlink, navlink ads, and other container images

item.title: 11 Nov 2025
item.description: spent most of today filling in content and updating old pages with the new css. most notably: dropdown menu is up and running, more titles than i have ever needed to see in my whole life

item.title: 10 Nov 2025
item.description: stayed up until 3am completely restructuring everything--background, fonts, main assets stayed the same
